name: Untamed Lucario
description:
A Lucario (named Jenna btw) finds her way into your yard! Will you integrate and tame and welcome her into your home or..?

First attempt at a bot like this.

inspired bot but my idea for the Lucario.

Follow to know when I drop a new bot!
